_notes: Precomputed previews for every knockout pairing the remaining bracket can still produce, keyed by the two team ids sorted and joined with '__'. tools/bracket.py injects the matching entry into data/matches.json the moment a matchup is decided; 'stakes' is derived from the bracket at that point, so it is not stored here.

storyline and things_to_watch are composed from each team's identity and signature threat (mirroring teams.json / players.json). head-to-head facts are curated; scorelines given are verified. Regenerate with tools/gen_matchups.py whenever the set of still-alive teams changes.

arg__bel.storyline: A semifinal between Belgium, a gifted, experienced generation, and Argentina, the reigning world champions. The winner goes to the World Cup final; the loser goes home one step short. Watch for Kevin De Bruyne and Lionel Messi to decide it.
things_to_watch: Kevin De Bruyne's pinpoint passes and whipped crosses
Lionel Messi, likely in his final World Cup, orchestrating the attack
Whether Belgium's patient possession can overcome Argentina's street-smart game management
h2h: Belgium and Argentina rarely cross paths, so there is little recent history between them — a genuine step into the unknown.

arg__bra.storyline: The Superclásico — South America's fiercest rivalry, and the two biggest names in the game. One match, in the New York area, to be crowned champions of the world. Watch for Vinícius Júnior and Lionel Messi to decide it.
things_to_watch: Vinícius Júnior taking his marker on one-on-one down the left
Lionel Messi, likely in his final World Cup, orchestrating the attack
Whether Brazil's dazzling wing play can overcome Argentina's street-smart game management
h2h: Argentina beat Brazil 1-0 in the 2021 Copa América final at the Maracanã (Ángel Di María), Lionel Messi's first senior title.
The great rivals have never met in a World Cup final.

arg__col.storyline: A rematch of the fiery 2024 Copa América final. Win and you are into the semifinals; lose and the World Cup is over. Watch for Lionel Messi and Luis Díaz to decide it.
things_to_watch: Lionel Messi, likely in his final World Cup, orchestrating the attack
Luis Díaz's relentless one-on-one dribbling down the left
Whether Argentina's street-smart game management can overcome Colombia's technical, rhythmic play
h2h: Fierce recent rivals — Argentina won the 2024 Copa América final 1-0, Lautaro Martínez scoring late in extra time.

arg__eng.storyline: One of football's most charged rivalries, thick with World Cup history. One match, in the New York area, to be crowned champions of the world. Watch for Harry Kane and Lionel Messi to decide it.
things_to_watch: Harry Kane dropping deep to spray passes, then sprinting into the box
Lionel Messi, likely in his final World Cup, orchestrating the attack
Whether England's controlled, structured play can overcome Argentina's street-smart game management
h2h: Charged with history — England won 1-0 in 2002 (a Beckham penalty), but Argentina went through on penalties in 1998 after Beckham's red card, and Maradona's 1986 'Hand of God' still stings.

arg__esp.storyline: World champions against European champions — a true heavyweight collision. The winner goes to the World Cup final; the loser goes home one step short. Watch for Lamine Yamal and Lionel Messi to decide it.
things_to_watch: Lamine Yamal cutting in from the right to curl shots at the far post
Lionel Messi, likely in his final World Cup, orchestrating the attack
Whether Spain's possession game can overcome Argentina's street-smart game management
h2h: World champions against European champions: a rare, final-worthy heavyweight clash.

arg__fra.storyline: A World Cup final between France, the defending champions, and Argentina, the reigning world champions. One match, in the New York area, to be crowned champions of the world. Watch for Kylian Mbappé and Lionel Messi to decide it.
things_to_watch: Kylian Mbappé's explosive acceleration cutting in from the left
Lionel Messi, likely in his final World Cup, orchestrating the attack
Whether France's lightning counters can overcome Argentina's street-smart game management
h2h: France and Argentina rarely cross paths, so there is little recent history between them — a genuine step into the unknown.

arg__mar.storyline: A World Cup final between Morocco, Africa's history-makers, and Argentina, the reigning world champions. One match, in the New York area, to be crowned champions of the world. Watch for Achraf Hakimi and Lionel Messi to decide it.
things_to_watch: Achraf Hakimi bombing forward from right-back like an extra winger
Lionel Messi, likely in his final World Cup, orchestrating the attack
Whether Morocco's counterattacking can overcome Argentina's street-smart game management
h2h: Morocco and Argentina rarely cross paths, so there is little recent history between them — a genuine step into the unknown.

arg__mex.storyline: A familiar World Cup pairing that Argentina have always come through. One match, in the New York area, to be crowned champions of the world. Watch for Raúl Jiménez and Lionel Messi to decide it.
things_to_watch: Raúl Jiménez holding the ball up to bring Mexico's runners into play
Lionel Messi, likely in his final World Cup, orchestrating the attack
Whether Mexico's quick passing can overcome Argentina's street-smart game management
h2h: Argentina have won every World Cup meeting — 2-1 in 2006, 3-1 in 2010, and 2-0 in the 2022 group stage, Messi scoring in the last of those.

arg__nor.storyline: A World Cup final between Norway, Erling Haaland's Norway, and Argentina, the reigning world champions. One match, in the New York area, to be crowned champions of the world. Watch for Erling Haaland and Lionel Messi to decide it.
things_to_watch: Erling Haaland lurking on the last defender's shoulder to burst in behind
Lionel Messi, likely in his final World Cup, orchestrating the attack
Whether Norway's direct, physical play can overcome Argentina's street-smart game management
h2h: Norway and Argentina rarely cross paths, so there is little recent history between them — a genuine step into the unknown.

arg__por.storyline: The dream stage for one last Messi versus Ronaldo meeting. The winner goes to the World Cup final; the loser goes home one step short. Watch for Cristiano Ronaldo and Lionel Messi to decide it.
things_to_watch: Cristiano Ronaldo hunting one more iconic moment, plus Portugal's set-piece threat
Lionel Messi, likely in his final World Cup, orchestrating the attack
Whether Portugal's technical midfield play can overcome Argentina's street-smart game management
h2h: They have never met in a competitive World Cup game — but the pull of Messi and Ronaldo sharing one last stage is irresistible.

arg__sui.storyline: A quarterfinal between Argentina, the reigning world champions, and Switzerland, disciplined and hard to break down. Win and you are into the semifinals; lose and the World Cup is over. Watch for Lionel Messi and Granit Xhaka to decide it.
things_to_watch: Lionel Messi, likely in his final World Cup, orchestrating the attack
Granit Xhaka dictating from deep with his range of passing
Whether Argentina's street-smart game management can overcome Switzerland's compact defending
h2h: Argentina edged Switzerland 1-0 in the 2014 Round of 16, Ángel Di María scoring in the 118th minute.

arg__usa.storyline: The co-hosts against the world champions — a David-and-Goliath tie. The winner goes to the World Cup final; the loser goes home one step short. Watch for Christian Pulisic and Lionel Messi to decide it.
things_to_watch: Christian Pulisic driving at defenders with the home crowd behind him
Lionel Messi, likely in his final World Cup, orchestrating the attack
Whether the USA's relentless pressing can overcome Argentina's street-smart game management
h2h: Argentina thrashed the USA 4-0 in the 2016 Copa América semifinal, Messi scoring a stunning free kick.

things_to_watch: Achraf Hakimi bombing forward from right-back like an extra winger
Harry Kane dropping deep to spray passes, then sprinting into the box
Whether Morocco's counterattacking can overcome England's controlled, structured play
h2h: Morocco and England rarely cross paths, so there is little recent history between them — a genuine step into the unknown.

eng__nor.storyline: A quarterfinal between Norway, Erling Haaland's Norway, and England, still chasing a first trophy since 1966. Win and you are into the semifinals; lose and the World Cup is over. Watch for Erling Haaland and Harry Kane to decide it.
things_to_watch: Erling Haaland lurking on the last defender's shoulder to burst in behind
Harry Kane dropping deep to spray passes, then sprinting into the box
Whether Norway's direct, physical play can overcome England's controlled, structured play
h2h: England usually dominate, but Norway's 2-1 win in a 1981 qualifier produced the immortal 'your boys took a hell of a beating' commentary.

eng__por.storyline: A World Cup final between England, still chasing a first trophy since 1966, and Portugal, carrying the ageless Cristiano Ronaldo. One match, in the New York area, to be crowned champions of the world. Watch for Harry Kane and Cristiano Ronaldo to decide it.
things_to_watch: Harry Kane dropping deep to spray passes, then sprinting into the box
Cristiano Ronaldo hunting one more iconic moment, plus Portugal's set-piece threat
Whether England's controlled, structured play can overcome Portugal's technical midfield play
h2h: England and Portugal meet regularly in European competition, so neither side holds many secrets from the other.

eng__sui.storyline: A World Cup final between England, still chasing a first trophy since 1966, and Switzerland, disciplined and hard to break down. One match, in the New York area, to be crowned champions of the world. Watch for Harry Kane and Granit Xhaka to decide it.

Granit Xhaka dictating from deep with his range of passing
Whether England's controlled, structured play can overcome Switzerland's compact defending
h2h: England and Switzerland meet regularly in European competition, so neither side holds many secrets from the other.

eng__usa.storyline: A World Cup final between England, still chasing a first trophy since 1966, and the USA, the high-energy co-hosts. One match, in the New York area, to be crowned champions of the world. Watch for Harry Kane and Christian Pulisic to decide it.
things_to_watch: Harry Kane dropping deep to spray passes, then sprinting into the box

esp__fra.storyline: A World Cup final between France, the defending champions, and Spain, the reigning European champions. One match, in the New York area, to be crowned champions of the world. Watch for Kylian Mbappé and Lamine Yamal to decide it.
things_to_watch: Kylian Mbappé's explosive acceleration cutting in from the left
Lamine Yamal cutting in from the right to curl shots at the far post
